detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

errorCode.description: A code that identifies the problem type.

instance.description: A unique URI that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

invalidFields.description: Detailed explanation of each validation error, when applicable.

requestId.description: A unique reference for the request, essentially the same as `pspReference`.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type.

type.description: A URI that identifies the problem type, pointing to human-readable documentation on this problem type.
